runner.description: Create a temporary SQLite snapshot on the VPS, run the bounded experiment against the snapshot, and leave the live DB plus systemd services untouched.

formulas.net_new_listings: max(listing_count_end - listing_count_start, 0) with discovery unique hits as a fallback when listing snapshots are absent

summary.winner_reason: Only one experiment was supplied, so it ranks first by default.
